silent_injection.weakest_point: The thesis treats the Group Organizer acquisition as a solved problem priced at a $120 fee waiver, but never tests whether Organizers will accept commercialization of their social capital. The firing squad correctly identifies this as the upstream catastrophic assumption: O_conv and G_transfer are silently assumed at 100% while the entire quantitative proof is conditioned on them. The thesis also contains a self-refuting internal contradiction — behavioral inertia is invoked to kill Design A (digital friction kills individual onboarding) but is then ignored in Design B (where the same 55+ members are assumed to follow an Organizer to a new physical venue with a new institutional brand). These two failures compound: the thesis has correctly diagnosed the disease and correctly identified the treatment direction, but has not proven the mechanism of the treatment works.
